description: Mirror of n6-architecture BT-C13 node #1 (consciousness-substrate) + Brodmann 1909 citation + n=6 arithmetic identity verifying L=6 mapping. Source of truth: n6 repo reports/discovery/consciousness-cluster-bt.md. Consumed by anima roadmap #54 (consciousness-substrate — Mk.X T1 매핑, Φ 4-path substrate indep).

brodmann_citation.author: Brodmann, K.
brodmann_citation.title: Vergleichende Lokalisationslehre der Grosshirnrinde
brodmann_citation.title_en: Comparative Localization Studies of the Cerebral Cortex
brodmann_citation.finding: Mammalian neocortex is organized into six horizontal layers (laminae I–VI): molecular (I), external granular (II), external pyramidal (III), internal granular (IV), internal pyramidal (V), multiform (VI).
brodmann_citation.accessible_via: public domain; reprinted by Springer 2006 (Garey translation)

cortical_column_reference.author: Mountcastle, V.
cortical_column_reference.title: Modality and topographic properties of single neurons of cat's somatic sensory cortex
cortical_column_reference.relevance: vertical cortical column functional unit spanning all 6 layers (~300–600 µm diameter)

n6_identity.identity_check: sigma*phi == n*tau == 24 EXACT (Jordan J₂, Trotter gate depth)

bt_c13_b_exact_ratio.rule: ≤1 % 상대오차 → EXACT, ≤5 % → CLOSE, else MISS. Scale-invariant (×10^k) allowed.

trotter_depth_identity.roadmap_52_consistency: identical identity already verified in state/n6_training_selftest_result.json (9/9 PASS, commit 1f82bba2)

four_path_substrate_indep_mapping.substrate_role: 6-layer cortical column serves as the neural substrate among 4 independent Φ paths. L = τ(6)+2 = 6 grounds the mammalian-neocortex path.
H100_gated: 4-path 중 ≥1 path 가 n6 consciousness-substrate L=6 layer 매핑 실증 (needs live Φ extractor on neural path)

consumer.roadmap_name: [n6 cluster] consciousness-substrate — Mk.X T1 매핑 (Φ 4-path substrate indep)
